summary: Cumulative cohort retention curve at configurable buckets over a configurable forward window — bar+line twin axes (cumulative repeat rate as bars, cumulative repeat sales as line). Cohort definition (ad-driven NTB, quarterly slices, calendar-window slices), bucket cadence (2-week, 4-week, 30/60/90/180-day), forward-window length (12 weeks → 12+ months), and segment splits (NTX, quarter-of-acquisition, single-vs-multi-tactic) are all parameter swaps; the output table schema (segment × bucket × {cum_repeat_rate, cum_repeat_sales}) is fixed and the chart contract is preserved.
questions: Ad-driven (SP/Display attribution + SUAS redemption) cohort cumulative brand repeat rate and sales by NTC vs Prev. Competitor Only segment, 2-week buckets over 12 weeks — bar+line twin-axes chart.
Of the people we acquired through any ad product (SP, Display, or SUAS) during a high-volume push, how many came back to the brand within 12 weeks?
Does NTC repeat behavior differ from Prev. Competitor Only repeat behavior in the post-acquisition ramp?
What share of post-conversion brand sales is attributable to NTB acquisitions vs. existing buyers reactivating during a campaign?
Plot cumulative brand repeat rate (bars) and cumulative brand repeat sales (line) at 2-week buckets through week 12 for an ad-driven NTB cohort, split by NTC vs competitor-switch segment.
How does the brand repeat trajectory change when we restrict the cohort source to SUAS-only or to SP+Display-only?
Cohort post-acquisition payback shape — when does cumulative repeat sales surpass acquisition cost for an ad-driven NTB cohort?
12-week cumulative brand repeat curve by NTX segment for users whose first ad-driven brand purchase fell in the cohort window.

Did NTB customers acquired during a Q3 push period continue to drive brand sales in the months after the push, compared to surrounding-quarter cohorts? Run the procedure once per acquisition quarter (Q1/Q2/Q3/Q4) with the segment field reinterpreted as cohort_quarter and stitch into one cohort-by-calendar-time retention chart.
Quarterly NTB cohort retention curves on calendar-month axis — push-quarter cohort vs surrounding-quarter cohorts, same bar+line twin-axes chart, segment field carries the acquisition quarter label.

Per-cohort NTB repeat-purchase rate at 30/60/90/180-day windows by monthly cohort, with right-censoring for cohorts that haven't reached each window — use bucket cadence = {30, 60, 90, 180} days and segment field = cohort_month; same wide-table chart contract.

Repeat-purchase rate of NTB ad-acquired customers measured at 30, 60, 90, and 180-day windows post-acquisition, broken out by acquisition cohort month, with NULL for incomplete windows — bar+line cumulative repeat curve with cohort_month as the segment split.

Multi-cohort post-acquisition retention comparison: stitch N runs of the procedure (one per cohort slice — quarter, month, push-window) and chart cumulative brand repeat side-by-side; the chart absorbs an arbitrary number of segment lines.
Cohort repeat curves where the segment axis is acquisition_quarter or acquisition_month instead of NTX type — same chart, different cohort definition CTE.
